segment.source: Renders exactly two pricing plan cards side by side, each with title, price, description, up to eight check-marked features, and a CTA button; the featured plan gets a ring and recommended badge. Use it for: either-or plan offers in the source — Basic vs Pro, Free vs Paid, private vs business rates. Prefer 'Three Tier Pricing' for three plans; use 'Compare Two Options' for non-pricing side-by-side comparisons.
